title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind announced that SynthID, an imperceptible watermarking system for identifying AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners. The watermark embeds identification directly into generated media without visible artifacts.
